Patch Set 1:

Build Started https://build.hpdd.intel.com/job/lustre-reviews/43875/

Patch Set 1:

When resubmitting a patch for review, you need to update the patch "in place" rather than submitting a second patch which corrects the issues with the first patch.  That can be done by editing the files again and then using "git commit -a --amend" to merge all of the new changes (the "-a" option) into the previous patch (the "--amend" option).  Please abandon the 25061 patch, and refresh this patch to address James' original comments.

parents.subject: LU-4017 quota: add project id support to lfs find

commit.subject: LU-9043 test: Remove conf-sanity 24a ALWAYS_EXCEPT
commit.message:
LU-9043 test: Remove conf-sanity 24a ALWAYS_EXCEPT

conf-sanity test 24a was added to the ALWAYS_EXCEPT list
due to bugzilla 23573. The issue described in bugzilla
23573 was fixed and landed to master.

conf-sanity test 24a should be removed from the
ALWAYS_EXCEPT list.

Test-Parameters: trivial envdefinitions=FAILURE_MODE=HARD failover=true osscount=2 testlist=conf-sanity testgroup=failover

Signed-off-by: dilip krishnagiri <dilipx.krishnagiri@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ic093a16231aa655b6895e1475b9bb5119f0c23a8
